default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and optimize Marcel's calendar and scheduling to improve productivity and work-life balance.](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Block off Monday and Wednesday mornings for deep work](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Consolidate recurring meetings on specific days (e.g. Tuesdays for deep-ground)](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Minimize mid-day meetings that fragment focus time](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Build in breaks for lunch and personal recharge](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Be more ad-hoc with recurring meetings when possible](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Topics

### Calendar Restructuring

  - [Start blocking Monday mornings until 11am for deep work](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Do the same for Wednesday mornings, block until noon](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Tuesdays packed with deep-ground meetings/one-on-ones, start at 9:30am](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Keep late Tues afternoons open for prospect meetings](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Move recurring meetings with Molly to afternoons when possible](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Decline regular standup meetings, join only when needed](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Move Shaddy's 1:1 to Thursdays if possible](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Breaks and Personal Time

  - [Build in a 30 min lunch break around 12:30-1pm most days](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Keep Fridays open after 2pm for recharge/personal time](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Block out holidays, anniversaries, camping trips, conferences etc.](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

### Invoicing and Payments

  - [Set up draft invoices in QuickBooks for review (Napsack, Webstacks)](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Default to Net 30 payment terms for now](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Special requirements for Reddit, to discuss with co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cancel recurring meetings with Sedera, Molly (Wed AM), Matt](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Reschedule meetings being moved (use \[rescheduling\] tag)](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Coordinate ramp workshop dates and travel for NY/SF](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Review draft invoices in QuickBooks](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Discuss Reddit invoicing directly with co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/9QUNY8Kze5e7y_s27K6jNT-rz78d-97H?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)

action_items.description: Reach out to Matt to reschedule recurring meeting and cancel next two occurrences while Marcel is out of office
Block Marcel's lunch break from 12:30 to 1 PM on his calendar starting this week
Reschedule weekly sync with Stacy from Tuesdays to Wednesdays starting next week, except for this week
Block Marcel's calendar for upcoming camping trip on December 27th
Draft invoices for Web stacks, Knapsack, and other clients in QuickBooks and leave in draft for Marcel's review
